summary: RBAC Leads Management Testing Complete - All features verified. Sales Executive (Divya Krishnan) correctly sees only Leads tab, only their assigned leads (10), static employee filter, and no reassign button. HR Manager (Priya Sharma) correctly sees Leads/HR Module/Finance tabs, all leads (36+), employee dropdown with 'All Employees', and can reassign leads.

sales_exec_tab_visibility.details: Sales Executive sees only 'Leads' tab - Dashboard, HR Module, Finance, Customers tabs are hidden

sales_exec_leads_filter.details: Sales Executive sees only 10 leads assigned to them (not created by them)

sales_exec_employee_filter.details: Employee filter shows static text 'Divya Krishnan' (not a dropdown)

sales_exec_reassign_hidden.details: Reassign button (pencil icon) is hidden for Sales Executive

sales_exec_summary_cards.details: Summary cards show counts for assigned leads only: 1 New, 1 Hot, 0 RCB, 4 Follow Up, 3 Payment Link Sent

sales_exec_redirect.details: After login, Sales Executive lands on /leads page (first visible tab)

hr_manager_tab_visibility.details: HR Manager sees Leads, HR Module, Finance tabs

hr_manager_all_leads.details: HR Manager sees all leads from all agents (36+ leads from 3+ agents)

hr_manager_employee_dropdown.details: Employee filter is a dropdown with 'All Employees' option and list of all employees

hr_manager_reassign.details: HR Manager can see and use reassign button - modal opens with Assign To dropdown and Reason field

hr_manager_redirect.details: After login, HR Manager lands on /hr page (first visible tab)

test_classes: TestRBACLogin - 2 tests PASS (visible_tabs verification for both roles)
TestRBACLeadsAccess - 3 tests PASS (leads filtering by assigned_to)
TestRBACReassignment - 1 test PASS (403 for Sales Exec reassign)

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation is correct - TAB_VISIBILITY for SALES_EXEC is ['leads'] only
get_data_filter for leads.view with scope='own' correctly uses {assigned_to: user_id}
Login response includes visible_tabs from rbac_service.get_visible_tabs()
Frontend correctly hides reassign button for isSalesExec
Employee filter shows static text for Sales Execs, dropdown for others
SmartRedirect routes to first visible tab correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - Divya Krishnan has 10 leads assigned
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC for Leads Management is fully functional. Sales Exec sees only their assigned leads and Leads tab. HR Manager has full access. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_rbac_leads.py covers all RBAC scenarios.
